languages.text: "Это то самое место, которое пытался спасти {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianShuttleFound}несчастный из шаттла{/d}. Боюсь, на поверхности нас ожидает кладбище..."

traits.locale_text: "Больно смотреть на место, где сгинуло так много человеческих ресурсов. Тем более что они реквизированы у Департаменто Муниторум. Какая прорва бумажной работы. Тот {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianShuttleFound}несчастный из шаттла{/d} не преуспел, так что ждет нас лишь кладбище..."
traits.speaker: HighFactotum

languages.text: "Why, this is the very place that the {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianShuttleFound}unfortunate soul in the shuttle{/d} was trying to save. I fear that we will find nothing but a graveyard down on the surface..."
languages.original_text: "Это то самое место, которое пытался спасти {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianShuttleFound}несчастный из шаттла{/d}. Боюсь, на поверхности нас ожидает кладбище..."

traits.locale_text: "Why, this is the very place that the {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianShuttleFound}unfortunate soul in the shuttle{/d} was trying to save. I fear that we will find nothing but a graveyard down on the surface..."

"Why, this is the very place that the {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianShuttleFound}unfortunate soul in the shuttle{/d} was trying to save. I fear that we will find nothing but a graveyard down on the surface..."

"It grieves me to look upon a world that has seen the waste of so many dynastic resources... I mean, the Guardsmen requisitioned by Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s ancestor. I do not believe the brave soul from the shuttle succeeded, so there can only be a graveyard waiting for us..."

"It grieves me to look upon a world that has seen the waste of so many human resources. Especially as they were requisitioned from the Departmento Munitorum. The ensuing paperwork will be quite staggering. Since that {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianShuttleFound}unfortunate soul in the shuttle{/d} failed the task, we are left with nothing but a graveyard there..."

"It grieves me to look upon a world that has seen such a waste of human resources. Especially as they were originally requisitioned from the Departmento Munitorum. The ensuing paperwork will be quite staggering. Since that {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianShuttleFound}unfortunate soul in the shuttle{/d} failed in his task, we can expect to find nothing but a graveyard there..."

"Why, this is the very place that the {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianShuttleFound}unfortunate soul in the shuttle{/d} was trying to save. I fear that we will find nothing but a graveyard down on the surface..."

"Why, this is the very place that the {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianShuttleFound}unfortunate soul in the shuttle{/d} was trying to save. I fear that we will find nothing but a graveyard down on the surface..."

"Why, this is the very place that the {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianShuttleFound}unfortunate soul in the shuttle{/d} was trying to save. I fear that we will find nothing but a graveyard down on the surface..."

languages.text: 「祖先が召集した衛兵が無駄にされた世界を見るのは悲しく…つまり、貴方の祖先が召集した衛兵が無駄にされた世界を見るのは悲しく… シャトルの英雄が成功したとは思えないので、私たちを待っているのは墓地だけでしょう…」
languages.original_text: "It grieves me to look upon a world that has seen the waste of so many dynastic resources... I mean, the Guardsmen requisitioned by Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s ancestor. I do not believe the brave soul from the shuttle succeeded, so there can only be a graveyard waiting for us..."

languages.text: "Burası {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianShuttleFound}mekikteki o talihsiz ruhun{/d} kurtarmaya çalıştığı yer. Korkarım ki yüzeyde mezarlık dışında hiçbir şey bulamayacağız..."
languages.original_text: "Why, this is the very place that the {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianShuttleFound}unfortunate soul in the shuttle{/d} was trying to save. I fear that we will find nothing but a graveyard down on the surface..."

traits.locale_text: "Burası {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianShuttleFound}mekikteki o talihsiz ruhun{/d} kurtarmaya çalıştığı yer. Korkarım ki yüzeyde mezarlık dışında hiçbir şey bulamayacağız..."

languages.text: “啊，这不就是那个在{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianShuttleFound}穿梭机里遇难的不幸之人{/d}拼命想拯救的地方嘛。恐怕我们到了那里，只会看到一片坟场……”
languages.original_text: "Why, this is the very place that the {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianShuttleFound}unfortunate soul in the shuttle{/d} was trying to save. I fear that we will find nothing but a graveyard down on the surface..."

traits.locale_text: “啊，这不就是那个在{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianShuttleFound}穿梭机里遇难的不幸之人{/d}拼命想拯救的地方嘛。恐怕我们到了那里，只会看到一片坟场……”

languages.text: "Warum, das ist genau der Ort, den die {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianShuttleFound}glücklose Seele in dem Shuttle{/d} retten wollte. Ich fürchte, wir werden unter der Oberfläche nur einen Friedhof finden ..."
languages.original_text: "Why, this is the very place that the {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianShuttleFound}unfortunate soul in the shuttle{/d} was trying to save. I fear that we will find nothing but a graveyard down on the surface..."

traits.locale_text: "Warum, das ist genau der Ort, den die {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianShuttleFound}glücklose Seele in dem Shuttle{/d} retten wollte. Ich fürchte, wir werden unter der Oberfläche nur einen Friedhof finden ..."

languages.text: « C'est cet endroit même que la {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianShuttleFound}brave âme de la navette{/d} tentait de sauver. C'est très probablement un cimetière qui nous attend à la surface... »
languages.original_text: "Why, this is the very place that the {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianShuttleFound}unfortunate soul in the shuttle{/d} was trying to save. I fear that we will find nothing but a graveyard down on the surface..."

traits.locale_text: « C'est cet endroit même que la {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianShuttleFound}brave âme de la navette{/d} tentait de sauver. C'est très probablement un cimetière qui nous attend à la surface... »

languages.text: «Vaya, este es el lugar que el {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianShuttleFound}desdichado de la lanzadera{/d} intentaba salvar. Me temo que en la superficie solo nos espere un cementerio...».
languages.original_text: "Why, this is the very place that the {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianShuttleFound}unfortunate soul in the shuttle{/d} was trying to save. I fear that we will find nothing but a graveyard down on the surface..."
